Item.name: Average
Item.info: Y = avg(x, w): sliding average of the sequence xx: input sequence or value; w: 2*w+1 is the window size, must be a positive integer; y: return the average sequence or number

Item.name: Absolute
Item.info: Y = abs(x): find the absolute value of each element of the sequence xx: input sequence or valuey: return absolute value sequence or number, satisfying y ≥ 0

Item.name: Exp10
Item.info: Y = exp10(x): find the power sequence with base 10, each element of the sequence x is an exponent x: input sequence or value;y: return the power sequence with base 10

Item.name: Exp
Item.info: Y = exp10(x): find the power sequence with base e, each element of the sequence x is an exponent x: input sequence or value;y: return the power sequence with base e

Item.name: Differential
Item.info: Y = diff(x): find the backward differentiation of the sequence x x: input sequence or value;y: return the differential sequence

Item.name: Integral
Item.info: Y = int(x): find the integral of the sequence x x: input sequence or value;y: return the integral sequence

Item.name: Log_e
Item.info: Y = ln(x): find the natural logarithm of each element of the sequence xx: input sequence or value, satisfying x > 0;y: return natural logarithm sequence

Item.name: Log_10
Item.info: Y = log10(x): find the logarithm of each element of the sequence x with base 10x: input sequence or value, satisfying x > 0;y: return the logarithm of the sequence with base 10

Item.name: Square
Item.info: Y = square(x): squares each element of the sequence x. x: input sequence or value; y: returns the square sequence, satisfying y ≥ 0.

Item.name: Sqrt
Item.info: Y = sqrt(x): square root of each element of the sequence x x: input sequence or value, satisfying x ≥ 0;y: return square root sequence, satisfying y ≥ 0

Item.name: Com-Mode
Item.info: Z = comm(x, y): find the common-mode of the corresponding elements of the sequences x and y. x and y: input sequences or values;z: return the common-mode sequences or number.

Item.name: Sine
Item.info: Y = sin(θ): find the sine of each element of the sequence θ θ: input sequence or value in radian;y: return the sine sequence or value, satisfying -1 ≤ y ≤ +1

Item.name: Cosine
Item.info: Y = cos(θ): find the sine of each element of the sequence θ θ: input sequence or value in radian;y: return the cosine sequence or number, satisfying -1 ≤ y ≤ +1

Item.name: Tangent
Item.info: Y = tan(θ): find the tangent of each element of the sequence θ θ: input sequence or value in radian;y: return the tangent sequence or number

Item.name: Correlation
Item.info: Z = corr(x, y): find the normalized correlation between the sequences x and y. x and y: input sequences, x and y must be of the same length; z: return the normalized correlation sequence.

Item.name: Convolution
Item.info: Z = conv(x, y): find the convolution of the sequences x and yx and y: input sequences;z: return the convolution sequence, whose length is equal to the length of the sequence x

Item.name: Expansion
Item.info: Y = zoom(x, s, d): expand to show a portion of the x sequencex: input sequence;s: start of the expanded range, in seconds;d: size of the expanded range, in seconds;y: return expanded sequence

Item.name: Decimation
Item.info: Y = deci(x, d): decimate the subsequence from the sequence of x by the decimation coefficient d x: input sequence;\n d: extraction coefficient, satisfying d > 0;y: return the decimation result sequence

Item.name: Interpolation
Item.info: Y = itpl(x, i, m): interpolate the sequence of x, the interpolation coefficients are ix: the input sequence;i: the interpolation coefficients;m: the interpolation method, 0 for linear, 1 for Sinc, 3 for Cubic;y: return the interpolation result sequence

Item.name: Maximum
Item.info: Y = max(x, g): find the vertical maximum value of each horizontal interval of the sequence x x: input sequence;g: size of the horizontal interval, in seconds, satisfying g & gt; 0;y:return the sequence of maximum values

Item.name: Minimum
Item.info: Y = min(x, g): find the vertical minimum value of each horizontal interval of the sequence x x: input sequence;g: size of the horizontal interval, in seconds, satisfying g & gt; 0;y:return the sequence of minimum values

Item.name: Arcsine
Item.info: Θ = arcsin(x): find the angle corresponding to each sine value in the sequence xx: input sequence or number of sine, satisfying -1 ≤ x ≤ +1; θ: return the sequence or number of angle, in radians, satisfying -π/2 ≤ θ ≤ π/2

Item.name: Arccosine
Item.info: Θ = arccos(x): find the angle corresponding to each cosine value in the sequence xx: input sequence or number of cosine, satisfying -1 ≤ x ≤ +1; θ: return the sequence or number of angle, in radians, satisfying 0 ≤ θ ≤ π

Item.name: Arctangent
Item.info: Θ = arctan(x): find the angle corresponding to each tangent value in the sequence xx: input sequence or number of tangent, satisfying -1 ≤ x ≤ +1; θ: return the sequence or number of angle, in radians, satisfying -π/2 ≤ θ ≤ π/2

Item.name: H-Sine
Item.info: Y = sinh(θ): find the hyperbolic sine corresponding to each element of the sequence θθ: input sequence or number, in radian;y: return hyperbolic sine sequence or number

Item.name: H-Cosine
Item.info: Y = cosh(θ): find the hyperbolic cosine corresponding to each element of the sequence θθ: input sequence or number, in radian;y: return hyperbolic cosine sequence or number

Item.name: H-Tangent
Item.info: Y = tanh(θ): find the hyperbolic tangent corresponding to each element of the sequence θθ: input sequence or number, in radian;y: return hyperbolic tangent sequence or number

Item.name: Angle
Item.info: D = deg(r): find the angle corresponding to each radian in the sequence r r: input sequence or number of radian;d: return the sequence or number of angle

Item.name: Radian
Item.info: R = rad(d): find the radians corresponding to each angle in the sequence d d: input sequence or number of angle;r: return the sequence or number of radian

Item.name: Reciprocal
Item.info: Y = rcpl(x): find the reciprocal of each element of the sequence x. x: input sequence or number; y: return the reciprocal sequence or number.

Item.name: Deskew
Item.info: Y = deskew(x, d): delay d time for sequence xx: input sequence;d: delay time in seconds;y: return delayed sequence

Item.name: Envelope
Item.info: Y = hilevlp(x): use the Hilbert transform to obtain the envelope waveform of the input sequence x x: input sequence;y: return envelope sequence

Item.name: Binarization
Item.info: Y = bin(x, t): binarize each element of the sequence x according to the threshold t x: input sequence or number;t: threshold;y: returns the binarized sequence or number, satisfying y ∈ {0, 1}

Item.name: Nand Gate
Item.info: Z = nand(x, y): nand, equivalent to the formula ! (X & Y)x and y: input sequences or values;z: return nand result sequence or number, satisfying y ∈ {0, 1}

Item.name: Nor Gate
Item.info: Z = nor(x, y): nor, equivalent to the formula ! (X | Y)x and y: input sequences or values;z: return nor result sequence or number, satisfying y ∈ {0, 1}

Item.name: D Flip-Flop
Item.info: Q = dff(clk, d, cs): D flip-flopclk: input clock sequence, valid on rising edge;d: input data sequence, satisfying d ∈ {0, 1};cs: input enable sequence, valid for 0;q: output result sequence or number, satisfying q ∈ {0, 1}
